en: I think middle seat people have lost their minds.
ko: 누가 중간 좌석에 앉은 사람들에게 거짓말했는지 모르겠어.

en: I don't know who lied to middle seat people,.
But you have no armrests, okay?
ko: 우리는 우리의 팔걸이를 마음의 선의로 나누지만,

en: We share our armrests out of the goodness of our heart,.
But you have no, and the energy that these,.
Middle seat people are barely on the flight, okay?
ko: 중간 좌석 사람들은 비행기에 거의 안 타, 알겠어?

en: They're the only seat in every row.
That if they don't show up, we celebrate.
We take a picture of their empty seat.
And we put it on Instagram and we go,.
What a Tuesday, man.
You ever seen a middle seat person pull out a laptop?
ko: 중간 좌석 사람이 노트북 꺼내는 거 본 적 있어?

en: It's the craziest thing I've ever seen.
ko: 내가 본 것 중에 가장 미친 일이야.

en: It's so hard for me not to look at them and go,.
Hey, nobody's in an office.
ko: 야, 아무도 중간 좌석 이메일 기다리고 있지 않아, 알겠어?

en: Waiting on a middle seat email, okay?
If anybody cared about your email,.
ko: 너는 통로 쪽에 앉아 있었을 거야, 큰 친구.

en: You'd be in the aisle, big dog.
I mean, it's hard for me.
ko: 그냥 손을 뻗어서 노트북을 닫고 싶어.

en: I just want to reach over and just close the laptop.
And go, you need to get your Kindle out, okay?
You need to read a story.
